channel.title: WinApp CLI on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in WinApp CLI on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: dotnet: Packaging and Package Identity for .NET apps with WinApp CLI on Windows
item.description:
Microsoft describes using the WinApp CLI to add package identity and create packages for .NET desktop apps on Windows. This enables deeper Windows integration and simpler distribution.

  • Source: .NET
